summary: Phase C end-to-end validation of CrateMindAI. Backend: new /api/tracks filters (has_bpm, key, folder, sort=bitrate/duration, invalid-sort fallback, combined filters, pagination stability) all pass (10/10 new + 8/8 regression = 18/18 pytest). Frontend: /library workspace renders '310 tracks', virtualized table, search debounce with URL q=, filter selects, clear-filters-button, sort click toggling asc/desc with URL updates, pagination (page=2 rows 101–200 confirmed), row selection + select-all + clear-selection, inspector open/close (Enter/Escape/close-button) with real fixture metadata, enrichment inspector-proposal panel shown for queue tracks (verified track_id=1 Helix Nova–Midnight Currents shows Current vs Proposed spotify block), saved views (7 built-ins + create/delete user view under 'My views'), column manager with artist/title disabled and bitrate toggle, keyboard '/' focus search, ArrowDown active row + Enter opens + Space toggles selection, shortcuts don't fire while typing in search, URL restoration for /library?missing=key&sort=bpm&order=desc = 19 tracks, invalid params /library?sort=bogus&issue=hack&page=-5 loads safely, mobile 390x844 renders track-card-list and inspector as drawer, 1440x900 inspector as right side panel. Regression: Home banner+metrics, /tracks and /collection redirect to /library, /jobs /quality /metadata-repair render. Safety: zero non-GET requests to /api/* observed during entire session.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor spec mismatch: task described data-testid="lib-page-info" but the element uses className="lib-page-info" (no testid). Text ('Page 2 of 4 · rows 101–200') is still fully readable by classname; consider adding data-testid="lib-page-info" for stronger test-selector guarantees.

aria-sort is correctly set on the parent role=columnheader div (not on the sort-<id> button). Anyone writing tests should query the column header, not the sort button. Consider mirroring aria-sort on the button for convenience.

useMediaQuery is initialized only via useState + change listener; if the viewport is resized to phone AFTER first mount, the phone view does render, but consider using ResizeObserver or Tanstack useMedia for SSR safety (non-blocking here since app is CSR).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Phase C flows verified: workspace render, filters, URL restoration, sort, pagination, selection, inspector w/ proposal, keyboard, saved views, column manager, responsive)

seed_data_creation: None — used /app/fixture_library (310 tracks). Created transient localStorage view 'TEST_MyView' and cleaned it up via delete-view-button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C complete and verified. Backend regression + new-filters suite: `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<public> pytest backend/tests/ -v` runs in ~2s (18 tests). Library workspace testids confirmed present and working: library-workspace, library-count, library-search-input, library-empty, library-loading, filter-{issue,status,confidence,genre,key,missing,bpm-min,bpm-max}, clear-filters-button (only rendered when filters other than q are set), track-table, track-table-body, track-select-all, track-select-<id>, selection-count, clear-selection-button, sort-<colId> (artist,title,genre,bpm,key,duration,bitrate,status), pagination-prev/next, saved-view-select, save-view-button, save-view-name-input, save-view-confirm, delete-view-button (uses window.confirm — auto-accept via page.on('dialog', d.accept)), column-manager-button, column-toggle-<colId>, track-inspector, inspector-close-button, inspector-proposal (only for enrichment queue tracks, e.g. track=1). Enrichment queue has 24 tracks. Phase D routes /issues, /enrichment, /audit, /folders still on legacy combined page — not tested per instructions. No POST/PATCH/DELETE ever issued to /api/* during any test flow.
